Class BlockingLoadBalancedRetryFactory

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.cloud.loadbalancer.blocking.retry.BlockingLoadBalancedRetryFactory
All Implemented Interfaces:
LoadBalancedRetryFactory
public class BlockingLoadBalancedRetryFactory extends Object implements LoadBalancedRetryFactory
An implementation of LoadBalancedRetryFactory for BlockingLoadBalancerClient.
Since:
2.2.6
Author:
Olga Maciaszek-Sharma

  • Method Details

    • createRetryPolicy

      public LoadBalancedRetryPolicy createRetryPolicy(String serviceId, ServiceInstanceChooser serviceInstanceChooser)
      Description copied from interface: LoadBalancedRetryFactory
      Creates a LoadBalancedRetryPolicy.
      Specified by:
      createRetryPolicy in interface LoadBalancedRetryFactory
      Parameters:
      serviceId - The ID of the service to create the retry policy for.
      serviceInstanceChooser - Used to get the next server from a load balancer.
      Returns:
      A retry policy for the service.
